title.value: DICOM Unique Identifiers (subset) for use with Document Sharing

description.value: A computable subset of [DICOM](https://dicom.nema.org) Unique Identifiers (UIDs), as registered in [DICOM PS3.6 Table A-1](https://dicom.nema.org/medical/dicom/current/output/chtml/part06/chapter_A.html). This CodeSystem enumerates only the DICOM UIDs that are referenced by the IHE FormatCode ValueSet, so that the ValueSet can be expanded and validated. It replaces the former, non-expandable reference to the DICOM RDF/OWL ontology namespace `http://dicom.nema.org/resources/ontology/DCMUID`. The code values, keywords and types are aligned with the `dicom-uids` CodeSystem (canonical `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/dicom-terminology/CodeSystem/dicom-uids`) so that consumers may switch to the full DICOM terminology once it is formally published.

copyright.value: DICOM® is the registered trademark of the National Electrical Manufacturers Association (NEMA). DICOM Unique Identifiers are defined in DICOM PS3.6.

description.value: The DICOM keyword for the UID, as given in DICOM PS3.6 Table A-1.
The DICOM UID Type (e.g. SOP Class, Transfer Syntax), as given in DICOM PS3.6 Table A-1.

definition.value: Key Object Selection Document Storage SOP Class. Used as the FormatCode for the XDS-I Key Object Selection (KOS) document.
